title: Energizer 9W RGBW Colour Changing E27 GLS LED Opal Bulb ES with Remote Control
features: Offers 15 colour options including red, green and blue
Lighting mode options including strobe and flashing
Supplied with easy to use remote control
LED E27 bulb with average life of 25,000 hrs
description: Easily change the colour of this LED E27 using the remote control supplied with the bulb. There is a choice of 15 colours including red, green and blue. Switching is easy, just the push of a button. This LED E27 bulb also offers a choice of light modes, featuring settings such as strobe and flashing amongst others. This 9W LED bulb is equivalent to a 60W incandescent GLS and has an avearge life of 25,000 hours, the Lumen output is 806. Product Features: Offers 15 colour options including red, green and blue Lighting mode options including strobe and flashing Supplied with easy to use remote control LED E27 bulb with average life of 25,000 hrs Choose from 5 colour intensity settings Specification: Manufacturer: Energizer RGBW + 4,000K Suitable For: Indoor Use Only Voltage: 220 to 240V Colour Changing Choice of 15 Colours 5 Intensity Settings Remote Control Included
